overall.description: A third-person perspective gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077, showing a character walking through a foggy, neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The character ascends a staircase to an elevated walkway, passes vending machines and a street food vendor, and explores the atmospheric urban environment with dense fog and vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy neon-lit city sidewalk with crossing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy street toward a staircase on the left

entered.detail: large vertical neon sign with red and blue illumination displaying TOYS
yellow striped pedestrian crossing painted on the street
tall pole with traffic signal lights and pedestrian crossing signals
dark building front with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy neon-lit city street at night, approaching a pedestrian crosswalk and a staircase leading upward. The atmosphere is dense with orange-tinted fog and vibrant neon signage illuminating the urban environment.

events.description: character begins ascending the concrete staircase to the upper level
moving from open street into covered stairwell beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs while passing pedestrians descending in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants descending the stairs toward the street

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading up to elevated walkway
metal handrails along the staircase sides
large concrete overpass bridge structure spanning above the street

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a concrete staircase beneath a massive overpass, transitioning from the open street to a more enclosed space. Other pedestrians move in the opposite direction as the climb continues upward through the foggy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with vending machines under overpass

events.description: emerging onto the elevated walkway with view of the street below
approaching street vendor with illuminated food grill and vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated platform past vending machines while observing the street vendor and cityscape below

notable_agents.action: street vendor wearing a hat tending to a glowing red food grill

entered.detail: black industrial vending machine with yellow warning triangle symbols
blue vending machine with illuminated product display
food cart with bright red glowing grill and steam rising
tall illuminated advertisement screen displaying a face

segments.scene_description: The character explores the elevated walkway beneath the massive overpass, passing industrial vending machines and approaching a street vendor with a glowing red grill. The view overlooks the foggy street below while neon lights illuminate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with advertisements and seating

events.description: slowing to observe the street vendor's grill before continuing past
passing a seated pedestrian on a green bench near illuminated advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway past the vendor toward a poster-covered area at the end

notable_agents.action: person sitting on green bench next to illuminated advertisement panel

entered.detail: illuminated poster with VOTE text and political messaging
long green bench with graffiti on the backrest
metal trash receptacles near the bench area

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the street vendor's glowing grill and continues along the covered walkway, passing a seated pedestrian on a green bench. The scene ends as the character approaches an illuminated VOTE poster at the walkway's end, with trash bins and graffiti-covered seating visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a foggy, neon-lit city street as it ascends into the enclosed industrial atmosphere of an elevated walkway. It begins with the character walking through dense, orange-tinted fog toward a pedestrian crosswalk and a set of stairs. As the character climbs the concrete staircase beneath a massive overpass, the open street gives way to a more confined space shared with passing pedestrians. The scene then expands onto the walkway, moving past industrial vending machines and a street vendor with a glowing red grill that overlooks the misty urban depths below. Finally, the camera glides past a seated pedestrian on a green bench and graffiti-covered seating before coming to a stop at an illuminated VOTE poster.
